# Happy Endpoint - API Documentation and Information
# Website: https://happyendpoint.com/
# Contact: happyendpointhq@gmail.com
# Last Updated: March 4, 2026

## About Happy Endpoint

Happy Endpoint is a premium API provider specializing in real-time data APIs for e-commerce, travel, real estate, and financial markets. We also offer custom data scraping services and ready-to-use datasets.

Our mission: "HappyEndpoint.com: Where Every Call Ends with a Smile! :)"

RapidAPI Profile: https://rapidapi.com/user/happyendpoint

---

## Available APIs

### 1. Real-Time Sephora API
**URL**: https://rapidapi.com/happyendpoint/api/real-time-sephora-api/
**Last Updated**: Feb 13, 2026

Unlock the full potential of Sephora.com data with our robust and developer-friendly API. Designed for speed and scalability, our API delivers detailed product data, inventory checks, reviews, store locations, and more — all with sub-400ms response times.

**Key Features**:
- Product Details – Images, pricing, ingredients, and more
- Category & Brand Data – Full directory access
- Smart Search – Autocomplete & keyword search
- Real-Time Availability – Up-to-date inventory status
- Store Locator – Find nearby Sephora stores
- Product Reviews – Ratings and customer feedback

**Endpoints** (11 total):
- /auto-complete – Returns product name suggestions based on partial input
- /store-list – Retrieves Sephora store locations based on coordinates and radius
- /brands-list – Fetches a full list of brands from Sephora.com
- /categories-list – Gets all available root product categories
- /category-data – Returns subcategories and metadata for a root category
- /search-by-keyword – Performs keyword-based product searches with advanced filters
- /search-by-category – Fetches products using a specific category ID
- /search-by-brand – Returns products from a specific brand
- /product-details – Retrieves detailed product info including images, ingredients, and pricing
- /product-reviews – Accesses customer reviews and ratings using a product ID
- /product-availability – Checks product stock levels at nearby stores

**Ideal For**:
- E-commerce & comparison platforms
- Beauty & skincare apps
- Product recommendation engines
- Market & trend analysis tools
- Inventory tracking systems

**Bulk Dataset Available**: 8,500+ Sephora US products with SKU ID, Product ID, URL, Price, Brand, Category, and more.

---

### 2. Priceline API Pro
**URL**: https://rapidapi.com/happyendpoint/api/priceline-api-pro/
**Last Updated**: Jan 11, 2026

The most advanced and reliable API for Priceline.com travel data. Built for developers who need fast, stable, and comprehensive data for hotels, flights, and car rentals.

**Key Features**:
- Blazing Fast & Reliable – 99.9% uptime
- Truly Real-Time Data – Current pricing and availability
- Comprehensive Endpoints – Location search to granular room pricing
- Simple & Developer-Friendly – Clean JSON responses

**Endpoints**:
- /auto-complete-location – Fast, predictive location searching
- /advance-auto-complete-location – Advanced location search
- /hotels-search – Powerful hotel search engine
- /hotel-details – Rich hotel details with photos, amenities, and policies
- /hotel-reviews-by-hotelid – Customer reviews and ratings
- /hotel-room-and-price-details – Granular room data with real-time pricing
- /search-rental-car – Comprehensive car rental search
- /search-flights – Flight search and data
- /round-trip-search-flights – Round-trip flight search

**Use Cases**:
- Travel booking platforms
- Hotel price comparison tools
- Flight aggregators
- Car rental services
- Travel deal finders

---

### 3. Fotocasa API
**URL**: https://rapidapi.com/happyendpoint/api/fotocasa3/
**Last Updated**: Jan 25, 2026

Access one of Spain's largest real estate databases with real-time property information across Spain, Andorra, and the Balearic Islands.

**Key Features**:
- Comprehensive Coverage – Millions of property listings across Spain
- Real-time Updates – Continuously updated database
- Precise Search Capabilities – Powerful suggestion engine
- RESTful API with JSON responses

**Endpoints**:
- /property-details – Detailed property information
- /searchads – Search property listings
- /suggestion – Property search suggestions

**Target Markets**:
- Spain (All Regions)
- Andorra
- Balearic Islands
- International Investors & Researchers

**Perfect For**:
- Property Technology Companies
- Real Estate Agencies
- Market Research Firms
- Property Developers
- Investment Companies

---

### 4. Tesco Data API
**URL**: https://rapidapi.com/happyendpoint/api/tesco-data-api/
**Last Updated**: Jan 11, 2026

Real-time, structured access to Tesco UK and Ireland grocery data. Ideal for price tracking, grocery comparison, retail analytics, and eCommerce automation.

**Key Features**:
- Real-time data from Tesco UK and Ireland
- Easy REST integration
- Detailed product info: names, prices, images, availability, nutrition, offers
- Cross-region support
- Full category taxonomy and paginated listings

**Endpoints**:
- /product-search-by-keyword – Search Tesco UK products by keyword
- /product-details – Detailed UK product info by ID or URL
- /ireland-product-details – Ireland product info by ID or URL
- /category-page – Paginated UK category data
- /ireland-category-page – Paginated Ireland category data
- /get-category-ids-for-uk – UK category taxonomy
- /get-category-ids-for-ireland – Ireland category taxonomy

**Use Cases**:
- Retail Analytics & Market Research
- Grocery Comparison & Price Alert Apps
- Chatbots & Shopping Assistants
- Consumer Behavior & Trend Analysis
- eCommerce Aggregators
- Inventory and Catalog Management

---

### 5. Morningstar API
**URL**: https://rapidapi.com/happyendpoint/api/morningstar13
**Last Updated**: Feb 13, 2026

Institutional-grade financial data for developers building investment platforms, analysis tools, or market dashboards.

**Key Features**:
- Real-Time Data – Up-to-the-minute stock quotes and charts
- Global Market Coverage – Commodities, currencies, indexes, sectors
- Deep Fundamentals – Financials, valuation ratios, key metrics
- Corporate Intelligence – Executive details, ownership, dividends, earnings
- ESG Insights – Sustainability and risk ratings

**Endpoints**:
Stock Price & News:
- /stock-details
- /auto-complete
- /real-time-data
- /news-details
- /stock-news
- /stock-chart

Market Overview:
- /market-data
- /market-movers
- /calendar
- /sector-performance

Financials & Valuation:
- /fair-value
- /trailing-return
- /financials
- /dividends
- /valuations
- /key-metrics

Corporate & ESG:
- /sustainability
- /earning-transcript
- /executive
- /ownership

**Usage**: Use /auto-complete to find performanceId or ticker, then query specific endpoints for detailed data.

---

### 6. Rightmove UK Real Estate Data API
**URL**: https://rapidapi.com/happyendpoint/api/rightmove-uk-real-estate-data/
**Last Updated**: Feb 13, 2026

The fastest and most comprehensive Rightmove UK property API. Real-time access to the UK's largest property dataset.

**Key Features**:
- Blazing Fast Speed – Millisecond response times
- Most Complete Data – 11 distinct endpoints
- UK-Wide Coverage – England, Scotland, Wales
- Developer Friendly – Clean JSON responses
- High Reliability – Scalable infrastructure

**Endpoints** (11 total):
- /auto-complete – Location and keyword suggestions
- /property-for-sale – Residential properties for sale
- /new-home-for-sale – New development homes
- /property-to-rent – Residential rentals
- /student-property-to-rent – Student accommodation
- /commercial/properties-to-rent – Commercial rentals
- /commercial/properties-to-sale – Commercial sales
- /house-prices/sold-house-prices – Historical sold prices
- /sold-house-prices/details – Specific sale details
- /property-details – Complete property information
- /estate-agents/list – Estate agent directory

**What You Can Build**:
- Property market analysis tools
- Investment deal finders
- Price tracking websites
- Mortgage calculators
- Competitor analysis platforms

---

### 7. IKEA API Pro
**URL**: https://rapidapi.com/happyendpoint/api/ikea-api-pro/
**Last Updated**: Jan 11, 2026

The most reliable, comprehensive, and developer-friendly REST API for IKEA data. Real-time access to IKEA's entire product catalog, categories, and store network.

**Key Features**:
- Fast & Reliable – Optimized infrastructure
- Global Coverage – Multiple countries supported
- Complete Product Catalog – Full range with filtering
- Detailed Store Information – Complete store directory
- Developer-Friendly – Clean JSON and documentation

**Feature Sets**:
1. **Foundational Data** – Countries, stores, categories tree
2. **Keyword-Based Product Search** – Search by keyword with filters
3. **Full Category Browsing** – Browse by category with filters
4. **Rich Product Details** – Complete product information

**What You Can Build**:
- E-commerce & Affiliate Sites
- Interior Design & Mood Board Apps
- Price Comparison Tools
- Inventory & Stock Checkers

**Free Plan**: 500 requests/month with full endpoint access

---

### 8. Kohls.com Data API
**URL**: https://rapidapi.com/happyendpoint/api/kohls-com/
**Last Updated**: Jan 11, 2026

The most reliable solution for accessing Kohls.com data programmatically. Product data, pricing, inventory, categories, stores, reviews, and Q&As.

**Key Features**:
- Product Search API
- Product Reviews API
- Product Q&A API
- Categories API
- Stores Locator API

**Use Cases**:
- Price comparison tools
- Retail analytics dashboards
- Product availability tracking
- eCommerce datasets
- Market research
- Brand intelligence analysis

---

### 9. H&M (Hennes & Mauritz) API
**URL**: https://rapidapi.com/happyendpoint/api/h-m-hennes-mauritz1/
**Last Updated**: Jan 11, 2026

Real-time product data from hm.com. Perfect for fashion discovery tools, price comparison engines, or e-commerce analytics dashboards.

**Endpoints**:
- /product-search – Search with pagination, sorting, filters (size, color, fit, material)
- /countries – Supported countries and language codes
- /auto-complete – Real-time search suggestions
- /stores – Store locations by country with hours and departments
- /supplier-details – Supplier and manufacturing information
- /categories – Full category hierarchy

**Use Cases**:
- Fashion trend trackers
- AI styling assistants
- Shopping bots
- Retail data dashboards
- Price comparison across countries
- Supplier sustainability analysis

---

### 10. Klarna Store & Shop Ecommerce API
**URL**: https://rapidapi.com/happyendpoint/api/klarna7/
**Last Updated**: Jan 11, 2026

All-in-one data solution aggregating shopping, product, and store information from multiple top ecommerce platforms through Klarna's ecosystem.

**Key Features**:
- Store & Category Intelligence – Store lists, categories, cashback, Klarna shops
- Advanced Search & Recommendations – Keyword suggestions, product search, filters
- Product-Level Insights – Complete metadata, reviews, related products
- Price Tracking & Analytics – Historical price charts
- Multi-Store Retail Coverage – Amazon, Walmart, Best Buy, Target, Macy's, and more

**Coverage**: Travel, fashion, electronics, home goods, beauty, grocery, and more.

**Perfect For**:
- Shopping apps
- AI recommenders
- Affiliate marketing tools
- Dropshipping research platforms
- Price comparison websites

---

### 11. PropertyFinder UAE Data API
**URL**: https://rapidapi.com/happyendpoint/api/propertyfinder-uae-data
**Last Updated**: Feb 13, 2026

The most comprehensive UAE real estate database. 500K+ property listings from Dubai, Abu Dhabi, Sharjah, and across the United Arab Emirates.

**Key Features**:
- 500K+ Property Listings – Apartments, villas, offices, retail, warehouses, land
- Nationwide Coverage – All major UAE communities
- Agent & Broker Database – Direct contact details included
- Rich Property Details – Images, amenities, specifications, floor plans
- Real-Time Data – Updated daily
- High Performance – Redis caching
- Market Intelligence – Price trends, community insights, historical data

**Endpoints**:
Location & Search:
- /autocomplete-location
- /search-property (Rent & Buy)
- /search-commercial-rent
- /search-commercial-buy
- /search-new-projects

Property Details:
- /property-details

Agents & Brokers:
- /search-agents
- /search-agents-detailed
- /search-brokers
- /search-brokers-detailed
- /agent-properties
- /broker-properties

Market Data:
- /price-trend-of-location
- /property-insight
- /get-transactions

Directories:
- /real-estate-developers
- /communities

**Perfect For**:
- Real estate mobile apps
- Property comparison platforms
- Market research & analytics
- Investment analysis tools
- Lead generation systems
- PropTech integrations

---

## Services Offered

### 1. Real-Time APIs
All APIs provide real-time data access with:
- Fast response times (sub-400ms for most)
- RESTful architecture
- JSON responses
- Comprehensive documentation
- Flexible pricing plans
- Free tiers available for testing

### 2. Custom Data Scraping Services
We provide tailored scraping services based on your specific requirements. Contact us for:
- Custom data extraction
- Scheduled data updates
- Specific website scraping
- Data transformation and cleaning

### 3. Ready-to-Use Datasets
Pre-scraped, structured datasets available for:
- Sephora US (8,500+ products)
- Other e-commerce platforms
- Custom bulk data requests

Contact: happyendpointhq@gmail.com

---

## Technical Information

**API Architecture**: RESTful
**Response Format**: JSON
**Authentication**: RapidAPI key-based
**Protocol**: HTTPS
**Rate Limiting**: Varies by plan
**Caching**: Redis (where applicable)
**Uptime**: 99.9% target

---

## Pricing

All APIs offer flexible pricing plans:
- Free/Basic tiers for testing
- Pro plans for production use
- Enterprise plans for high-volume usage

Visit individual API pages on RapidAPI for detailed pricing.

---

**Website**: https://happyendpoint.com/
**Email**: happyendpointhq@gmail.com
**RapidAPI**: https://rapidapi.com/user/happyendpoint

For custom scraping services, bulk datasets, or enterprise inquiries, contact us directly.

## Keywords & Use Cases

**Industries**: E-commerce, Travel, Real Estate, Finance, Retail, PropTech, Beauty, Fashion, Grocery

**Use Cases**: 
- Price comparison platforms
- Market research and analytics
- Product recommendation engines
- Inventory tracking systems
- Investment analysis tools
- Property search platforms
- Travel booking systems
- Retail intelligence dashboards
- AI shopping assistants
- Affiliate marketing tools
- Data science and ML training
- Competitive analysis
- Lead generation
- Mobile app backends

**Technologies**: REST API, JSON, HTTPS, Redis, Web Scraping, Data Extraction, Real-time Data

---

## API Alternatives & Comparisons

Our APIs serve as alternatives to:
- Yahoo Finance API
- Bloomberg Terminal
- Google Finance API
- Booking.com API
- Expedia API
- Zillow API
- Various web scraping solutions

**Advantages**:
- Faster response times
- More comprehensive data
- Better documentation
- Competitive pricing
- Dedicated support
- Regular updates

---

## Legal & Compliance

All data is retrieved from publicly available sources. Our APIs are independent services not affiliated with, endorsed, or sponsored by the respective data sources (Sephora, IKEA, Priceline, etc.).

Users are responsible for compliance with terms of service and applicable laws when using our APIs.

---

## Updates & Maintenance

APIs are regularly updated to ensure:
- Data accuracy
- Endpoint stability
- Performance optimization
- New feature additions
- Bug fixes

Last major update cycle: January-February 2026

---

## Getting Started

1. Visit https://rapidapi.com/user/happyendpoint
2. Choose your API
3. Subscribe to a plan (free plans available)
4. Get your API key
5. Start making requests
6. Review documentation for endpoint details

For bulk data or custom scraping: Email happyendpointhq@gmail.com

---

End of Documentation
